metadata.name: Frogmite cast via Affinity for artifacts — cost reduced to {0}
metadata.description: p1 controls four distinct artifacts (Sol Ring, Arcane Signet, Swiftfoot Boots, Lightning Greaves) and casts Frogmite (base cost {4}). Affinity for artifacts applies: cost is reduced by {1} for each artifact controlled (CR 702.41a). With 4 artifacts on the battlefield, the reduction is {4}, making the total cost {0}. p1 casts Frogmite for free, it resolves, and enters the battlefield as a 2/2 Artifact Creature — Frog. After resolution p1 controls 5 artifacts.
metadata.generation_notes: Tests the Affinity keyword (CR 702.41a): each artifact controlled reduces the spell's cost by {1}. Frogmite has base cost {4} and Affinity for artifacts. With exactly 4 artifacts controlled, the cost is reduced by 4 to {0} — p1 needs no mana in pool. Frogmite's oracle text: 'Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)' — it is itself an artifact, but Frogmite is in hand (not on the battlefield) when cast, so only the 4 already-controlled artifacts count toward the reduction (CR 702.41a says 'for each artifact you control', and a spell on the stack is not a permanent you control). The four artifacts used are all distinct engine-supported cards: Sol Ring ({1}), Arcane Signet ({2}), Swiftfoot Boots ({2}), Lightning Greaves ({2}). Affinity is a static cost-reduction ability that functions while the spell is on the stack (CR 702.41a), calculated during the total-cost determination step (CR 601.2f). After Frogmite resolves it enters the battlefield as an artifact creature, bringing p1's total artifact count to 5.

script.step_note: p1 casts Frogmite using Affinity for artifacts — 4 artifacts reduce {4} cost to {0}

actions.description: Initial: p1 controls 4 artifacts, Frogmite in hand, stack empty, p1 mana pool empty
actions.note: 4 artifacts on battlefield establishes the affinity reduction of {4}
CR 601.2 + CR 702.41a: p1 casts Frogmite; Affinity for artifacts reduces {4} cost by {1} per artifact controlled (4 artifacts) = {4} reduction; total cost is {0}. No mana needed.

actions.description: After casting: Frogmite on stack, hand empty, 4 artifacts still on battlefield
actions.note: Frogmite moved from hand to stack; the 4 artifacts are permanents and remain on the battlefield
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Frogmite resolves and enters the battlefield under p1's control as a 2/2 Artifact Creature — Frog.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Frogmite resolves, entering the battlefield. The Affinity static ability was applied during casting (CR 702.41a); no further cost-related effect at resolution.

actions.description: After resolution: Frogmite on p1's battlefield (now 5 artifacts total), stack empty
actions.note: Frogmite entered battlefield as an artifact creature; p1 now controls 5 artifacts (Sol Ring, Arcane Signet, Swiftfoot Boots, Lightning Greaves, Frogmite).
